name: JBI Critical Appraisal Checklist for Case Series
applies_to: Case series and single-arm descriptive studies (no comparison group)
overall_judgment_rule: Count 'Yes' responses across the 10 items. >=7 Yes = High quality; 4-6 = Moderate; <=3 = Low.

domains.name: Clear criteria for inclusion in the case series
signaling_questions: Were the inclusion criteria for the case series clearly defined and reported?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: explicit, well-defined inclusion criteria stated. No: no criteria described. Unclear: vague or partial criteria.

domains.name: Condition measured in a standard, reliable way for all participants
signaling_questions: Was the condition (e.g., burn type/depth) measured in a standardized way across all participants?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: standardized clinical assessment used. No: variable or undefined methods. Unclear: not described.

domains.name: Valid methods used for identification of the condition
signaling_questions: Were valid methods (e.g., medical records, registry data, clinical examination) used to identify cases?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: valid case ascertainment described (records, registries, exams). No: invalid or unclear methods. Unclear: not described.

domains.name: Consecutive inclusion of participants
signaling_questions: Did the case series include consecutive participants (or otherwise avoid selective sampling)?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: consecutive enrollment stated, or all eligible included. No: selective sampling. Unclear: not described.

domains.name: Complete inclusion of participants
signaling_questions: Did the case series include all eligible participants from the source population, with reasons for exclusions documented?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: all eligible included or exclusions clearly justified. No: significant unexplained exclusions. Unclear: not addressed.

domains.name: Clear reporting of demographics
signaling_questions: Were demographic characteristics (age, sex, etc.) of participants clearly reported?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: demographics clearly tabulated/reported. No: demographics absent. Unclear: minimal or partial reporting.

domains.name: Clear reporting of clinical information
signaling_questions: Was clinical information about each case (presentation, severity, mechanism) clearly reported?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: detailed clinical information reported. No: clinical details absent. Unclear: limited reporting.

domains.name: Clear reporting of outcomes or follow-up results
signaling_questions: Were outcomes (e.g., mortality, healing, complications) clearly reported for participants?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: outcomes clearly reported with denominators. No: outcomes not reported or unclear. Unclear: partial reporting.

domains.name: Clear reporting of presenting site(s) / clinic demographic information
signaling_questions: Were the presenting site(s) or clinic(s) and their demographic catchment clearly described?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: site type, location, and catchment described. No: setting unclear. Unclear: minimal site information.

domains.name: Appropriate statistical analysis
signaling_questions: Was the statistical analysis appropriate for the descriptive nature of the study (e.g., descriptive statistics, frequencies)?
domains.criteria_summary: Yes: appropriate descriptive statistics used. No: inappropriate analysis. Unclear: methods not described. Not applicable: no analysis performed.
